title: Government Complaints/Government Ombudsman Offices * Immigration Issues - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Government Complaints/Government Ombudsman Offices * Immigration Issues 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - Disability Benefit Recipients Immigration Issues Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF OREGON DEPARTMENT OF JUSTICE SANCTUARY PROMISE HOTLINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Tracks and reports sanctuary promise violations. Provides victim and witness support, information, and a referral hotline. The Oregon Department of Justice (ODOJ) may open an investigation into reported sanctuary promise law violations. Hotline advocates do not control the outcome of ODOJ investigations or decisions to sanction a perpetrator of a violation. 1162 Court Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (884) 924-7829 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON DEPARTMENT OF JUSTICE SANCTUARY PROMISE HOTLINE
